UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific settings, preferences, and basic identifying information.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user (e.g., Firebase Auth UID).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

Medication.title: Medication
Medication.description: Represents a medication schedule and inventory for a user.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this medication.

dosageAmount.description: The amount of medication per dose.

times.description: List of times (HH:mm) when the medication should be taken.

startDate.description: The date when the medication schedule starts.

totalQuantity.description: The initial total quantity of medication.

remainingQuantity.description: The current remaining quantity of medication.

refillThreshold.description: The threshold quantity at which a refill alert is triggered.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores individual medications for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user owner.

params.name: medicineId
params.description: The unique identifier of the medication.

firestore.reasoning: The 'medicines' subcollection is nested under the user document to enforce ownership and simplify data isolation per user.
